name: agent-mq
description: Distributed agent management system — a Postgres-backed pull task queue (Project=Topic, Task=Message, Agent=Consumer, Group). FIFO + capability filter + concurrency limits, no scoring.

scripts.db:reset: docker compose down -v && docker compose up -d db
scripts.setup: pnpm install && pnpm db:up && node scripts/wait-for-db.mjs && pnpm migrate && pnpm seed
